title: stachys xanthantha
intro: Stachys xanthantha, also known as golden betony, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and distinctive leaves. Traditionally, golden betony has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, ulcers, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stachys xanthantha include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Golden betony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
